title: Test harness: property-based, fault injection, simulation, and benchmarks
description:
Implement the extended test harness from docs/plan-repeating-triggers-test-harness.md.

Sections: Property-Based Tests, Fault Injection / Chaos Tests, Deterministic Simulation Tests, Benchmarks and Performance Tests

Key deliverables:
- Property-based invariant tests (Invariants 1-5: max firings bound, cooldown gap, no post-expiry firings, default behavior preserved, monotonic fire count)
- Fault injection tests: action failure on repeating trigger, concurrent events during cooldown, expiry during condition evaluation, clock jump forward
- Comparison oracle: before/after behavior equivalence for existing one-shot tests
- Deterministic simulation with seeded event generator and controllable clock
- Cooldown boundary simulation (Cooldown-1ms, Cooldown, Cooldown+1ms)
- Benchmarks: processEvent with N triggers, cooldown check overhead, expiry reaping
- All tests run with -race flag

References:
- Test harness: docs/plan-repeating-triggers-test-harness.md (all sections)
- Plan: docs/plan-repeating-triggers.md §URP (Clock interface)
- Depends on: h2-1kp.2 (full implementation must exist before harness tests)
